content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

May 1, 2007

Dale Skillicorn
Watsonville City Council Member
729 Palm Avenue
Watsonville, California 95076

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-07-062

Dear Mr. Skillicorn:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").¹ You have asked several questions regarding the conduct of a member of the Watsonville City Commission. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations Section 18329(b)(8)(B), unless the Commissioner has authorized you as his representative, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. I have enclosed a copy of Regulation 18329 for your review.

Additionally, we must decline your request for advice since our response would amount to advice on past conduct. (See § 83114; subd. (b); Regulation 18329, subd. (b)(8)(A)&(C) copies enclosed.) Formal written advice is the application of law to a given set of facts provided by the requestor and has the effect of conferring immunity to the requestor. (Section 83114; Regulation 18329(b)(7).) Your current question involves analysis of a series of interrelated decisions, some of which have already occurred, such that any advice at this time would necessarily relate to past conduct and, therefore, would not further the impartial, effective administration of the Act so mandated by Section 83111.

Therefore, we cannot consider your request. If you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you may file the enclosed complaint form with our

¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.

File No. W-07-062
Page No. 2

Enforcement Division. If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at
(916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

[signature]
By: Sukhi Brar
Counsel, Legal Division
